mustPass: Include a dedicated reference-projects route because this industry relies on showing completed builds.
Include a quote-focused conversion route in addition to contact because larger building projects typically start with an offer request.
Reflect trust and risk-reduction signals relevant to construction, such as insurance, guarantees, ID06 and reference projects when data exists.
Support both single-page and multi-page setups without losing projects, services or contact clarity.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not structure the site like a simple household repair service when the company works with larger building projects.
Do not promise fixed prices, exact timelines or permits unless the business has supplied that information.
Do not invent certifications, warranty lengths, project counts or customer ratings.
Do not make the portfolio purely decorative; it should help explain scope and type of completed work.
